summary: Backend testing for 7 sync fixes: PRs, Exercise Names, Badge Counts, Leaderboard. All 19 tests passed. One test selector correction made (prsHit is nested under stats object in weekly-review, not top-level - this is correct behavior).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 sync fixes verified: (1) Badges: 200 OK, PR badge structure correct. (2) GET /api/prs: returns list with exercise names. (3) GET /api/prs/bests/overview: 200 OK, returns category data. (4) GET /api/lifts: user isolation confirmed (user A and B have distinct userIds in lifts). (5) GET /api/leaderboard?tab=prs: 200 OK, entries present. (6) GET /api/analytics/overview: prsThisBlock field present and >= 0. (7) GET /api/weekly-review: prsHit present under stats sub-object (not top-level), value >= 0.
